theme: drawing a picture in sand on a vibrating plate
title: Sand Garden: Mass-Loading a Chladni Plate to Steer a Nodal Line
strategies: trivial: reproduce the checker's own uniform mass-spread baseline (no targeting at all)
greedy: pile mass directly onto the target cells up to the per-cell cap, spend any leftover uniformly elsewhere -- ignores that this can swap which mode ends up ranked k

strong: simulate the actual generalized eigenproblem, co-design the mass loading and the resulting mode ordering via a bounded local search that evaluates candidates by the true post-load mode-k identity, not by a static heuristic
invalid: emit an infeasible / wrong-length / out-of-range / non-finite loading
